PLAN_STATE: Use the graph’s dense core around N01/N03/N07/N09/N13/N21/N22/N23/N24/N25/N28 as the main constraint region.
PLAN_STATE: After a candidate is found, verify all listed edges incident to changed nodes to avoid introducing new conflicts.
PLAN_STATE: If one repair path stalls, switch to a broader recoloring of the core rather than local tweaks.
